description: Promotional offers and deals exclusively available through the brand's mobile app, emphasizing limited-time value and app-first incentives.
structural_recipe: Lead with a promotional hook highlighting the exclusive app benefit (free item, discount, or combo). Include clear call-to-action directing users to download or use the app. Specify temporal limitations ('فترة محدودة') and location constraints ('فروع مختارة'). Use emojis for visual appeal and emphasis on food/reward imagery. Structure as: benefit statement + item details + app-only emphasis + urgency markers.
why_it_works: Drives app adoption and retention in Saudi market where mobile-first commerce is dominant. Creates FOMO through exclusivity and time-sensitivity, which resonates with Saudi consumers' preference for limited-time value. App-exclusive positioning increases user engagement metrics and builds brand loyalty through direct digital relationship.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure app infrastructure supports the promised offer volume during promotion period
Limited-time language must comply with SAMA e-commerce regulations
Geographic restrictions ('فروع مختارة') may create customer service friction if unclear
App exclusivity may alienate non-app users; consider hybrid promotion channels
